pr.title: PR #127 â€” Capability Relationship Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds the **Capability Relationship Framework** â€” the first formal *relationship* layer, on top of the Global Capability Registry (#122, identity) and Capability Summary (#125, understanding). It moves beyond linear previous/next capability chains and models capability evolution as a **graph-ready, deterministic, append-only edge list** of typed, directed relationships (`source -> target`).

This is *structure only* per the spec non-goals: **no graph engine, no graph queries, no visualization, no dashboard, no Organizational Twin, no automatic relationship discovery, no network calls.** The registry/summary are consumed read-only via an optional `known_capability_ids` set used solely to detect orphans; nothing is mutated.

### What landed
- `src/axiom_core/capability_relationship.py`:
  - Models: `CapabilityRelationship` (relationship_id, source/target_capability_id, relationship_type, confidence, summary, created_at, schema_version, raw_payload), `CapabilityRelationshipType` (`BUILDS_ON`/`ENABLES`/`RELATED_TO`/`DEPENDS_ON`/`SUPERSEDES`/`DERIVED_FROM`/`AFFECTS`/`VALIDATES`/`REPAIRS`), `CapabilityRelationshipReference` (graph-ready edge projection), `CapabilityRelationshipReport`, `CapabilityRelationshipEvidence` + `CapabilityRelationshipEngine`.
  - **Deterministic ordering** by `(source, target, relationship_type, relationship_id)` â€” input order is irrelevant.
  - **Relationship-type validation**: types are normalized case-insensitively to the canonical UPPERCASE set; unknown types are rejected. Missing source/target/type rejected; non-numeric `confidence` rejected; `confidence` clamped to `[0,1]`.
  - **Duplicate detection**: edges are deduplicated on `(source, target, type)`; the first occurrence in deterministic order is kept and the rest counted in `duplicate_relationship_count`.
  - **Orphan detection**: `orphan_capability_ids` = known capabilities that appear in no edge.

    ```
    edge = (source_capability_id, target_capability_id, relationship_type)
    # keep first in sorted order, count the rest as duplicates
    relationship_type_counts = sorted tally over deduped edges
    references            = [edge projection per deduped relationship]
    orphan_capability_ids = sorted(known_capability_ids) - {c in any edge}
    passed = relationship_count > 0 and duplicate_relationship_count == 0
    ```
- CLI `capability-relationship-create` / `capability-relationships` (list) / `capability-relationship-show` / `capability-relationship-export` (JSON/Markdown/CSV), registered in `command_registry.py`, `test_selection_engine.py`, `test_command_registry.py`.
- Evidence bundle under `artifacts/capability_relationships/<run_id>/`: `capability_relationship_request.json`, `capability_relationship_result.json`, `capability_relationship_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json` (gitignored). Append-only `append()` preserves existing edges verbatim and merges `known_capability_ids`.

### What did not change
No architecture/dependency changes, no graph engine/queries/visualization, no orchestration, no network calls. No mutation of existing registry entries, timeline events, or summaries. Revit 2024 baseline unaffected.

### Validation
- `poetry run pytest -q` â†’ **4168 passed, 1 skipped** (+44; baseline 4124 at #126)
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` â†’ **0 errors**
- CLI smoke verified with an adversarial fixture: deterministic reorder, case-insensitive duplicate edge deduped (`enables` == `ENABLES`) â†’ `duplicate_relationship_count=1`/`passed:false`, orphan `cap-199` detected, all 3 export formats, `show missing`â†’exit 2, traversalâ†’exit 1, invalid typeâ†’exit 1.


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
